content.en:
100 billion years, 100 billion years, and so on.

Over the years, the overall strength of the Dark Soul Domain has grown rapidly, but the growth rate of the Soulless Soul Ancestor has become slower and slower, and in the future, it will be difficult to give birth to a Peerless Soul Ancestor for tens of billions of years, plus the Peerless Soul Ancestors are still fighting each other, occasionally falling one or two Peerless Soul Ancestors, causing the number of Soulless Soul Ancestors in the Dark Soul Domain to stabilize at one number, and occasionally drop one or two.

With the help of an almost invincible peerless soul ancestor like Ye Tian, the strength of the human race has developed rapidly, and with sufficient resources, the human race has given birth to a large number of invincible domain ancestors, and even ten superior soul ancestors, which is an opportunity for the human race.

But after the birth of ten unsurpassed soul ancestors, it will be difficult for the human race to give birth to more unsurpassed soul ancestors, not only related to the end of the welfare of the dark soul domain, but also related to luck.

In the same force, there are more than a dozen Superior Soul Ancestors, and it is very difficult to continue to be born.

Of course, if there are enough resources and opportunities, more peerless soul ancestors can still be born, but it is definitely a long time.

At this time.

Ye Tian had already comprehended the Spatial Ancestor Method, and he could step into the Ancestral Realm at any time with the help of the Spatial Ancestor Method.

And in addition to him, one of the most powerful Peerless Soul Ancestors in the Dark Soul Domain was a mid-stage powerhouse of the Peerless Soul Ancestor, and he belonged to the ontological residents, far from being Ye Tian's opponent, and was like an ant in Ye Tian's eyes.

"Soon, a trillion years are coming, and at that time, the Dark Soul Domain will not be able to restrict the entry of the Ancestors of the Superior Domain, and at that time, the first Ancestral Realm will be born, and a large number of innate things will be born, and they will be innate things of the Ancestral Realm. Moreover, the first ancestral realm to be born in the Dark Holy Land was the primordial ancestral realm. The birth of the Primordial Ancestral Realm will inevitably give birth to the Primordial Ancestral Spring, and if you soak in the Primordial Ancestral Spring, your cultivation will improve rapidly, and you can even make the body of the Peerless Domain Ancestor refine it a second time, which is a real great opportunity!"

Ye Tian muttered.

At that time, his body can also enjoy the opportunity of the primordial ancestral realm, and let the supreme domain body undergo a second transformation, this is the only chance for the Dark Holy Land, and the ancestral realm born after that will not give birth to the primordial ancestral spring.

In the distant era, when the Dark Sanctuary was just born, the Primordial Ancestral Realm was torn apart, but now, the Ancestors still longed for the opportunity of the Primordial Ancestral Realm.

It's a pity to know that the primordial ancestral realm was born, what a precious opportunity, countless peerless domain ancestors will fight.

Ye Tian undeniably that his strength was indeed very strong, but it did not mean that the superior domain ancestors of other forces were very weak.

The major forces have hidden their strength, and in the time and space of annihilation, those unsurpassed domain ancestors don't seem to have too demonic existence, but who knows if there will be very demonic ones?

Moreover, if there is a high-level domain ancestor peak powerhouse, he has already reached the realm where he can achieve the ancestor, and he has been enduring not breaking through, and once he enters the dark soul domain, he will immediately break through to become the ancestor?

In this way, the other party would be sure to control the Dark Soul Domain, and even prevent other peerless soul ancestors from attacking the Ancestor in the future.

At the beginning, the Dark Soul Domain gave birth to the Holy Ancestor, and the Dark Soul Domain was the first time that it knew that in addition to the Dark Destruction Domain, a second Dark Holy Land would be born, and it was not ready at all, which made the Dark Soul Domain rise.

But this time is different, the Dark Destruction Domain and the Dark Sanctuary are fully prepared and vow to take the Dark Soul Domain, so it is almost unrealistic for the local residents of the Dark Soul Domain to want to be the first to give birth to an ancestor and completely control the Dark Soul Domain.

......

"The major forces really have a peerless peak domain ancestor who can quickly achieve an ancestor, but it is very difficult for them to achieve an ancestor in the dark soul domain, it takes a lot of time, after all, they are domain ancestors, not soul ancestors. But my copy body is different, but it is a topless soul ancestor, so it is many times easier to become an ancestor in the Dark Soul Domain!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Soon, the deadline of a trillion years will be approaching.

Outside the Dark Souls.

A large number of unsurpassed domain ancestors have arrived, and there are even some unfamiliar unsurpassed domain ancestors, which are obviously the hidden hole cards of the major forces.

Some of these Superior Domain Ancestors are too old, and some are even older than the Ancestors, and their breaths are extremely terrifying, obviously they are all terrifying existences that have given birth to the Ancestral Body, and have cultivated the Ancestral Body to a realm that is not low, and they have mastered powerful ancestral skills.

Ye Tian, as a domain ancestor with no superior peak, naturally had to enter the Dark Soul Domain.

It can be said that almost all the ancestors of the Peerless Domain have to enter the Dark Soul Domain to compete for this opportunity.

It is conceivable that this time the Primordial Ancestral Realm is afraid that it will fall into a terrifying battle, and it will even crack the Primordial Ancestral Realm of the Dark Soul Domain.

this day.

"It's coming!"

Ye Tian said in a low voice.

Bang!!!!

The Dark Souls Realm has metamorphosed, and the rules have changed dramatically.

At the same time, in the central area of the Dark Souls, an incomparably large world was born in one place.

This world is the Primordial Ancestral Realm!

As soon as the Primordial Ancestral Realm was born, many Supreme Soul Ancestors of the Dark Soul Domain descended here, and Ye Tian's copy body, the Qingye Soul Ancestor, also came here.

Whoa!!!!

An unnamed Domain Ancestor from the outside world stepped into the Dark Soul Domain.

Many of the Peerless Domain Ancestors exuded the aura of the peak of the Peerless Domain Ancestors, far surpassing the ordinary Peerless Soul Ancestors.

Moreover, these Peerless Soul Ancestors have a short cultivation time, and they have not mastered the ancestral skills and ancestral bodies, so they are naturally far from being able to compete with these ancient Peerless Domain Ancestor peak powerhouses.

For a moment, many of the Dark Soul Domain's Superior Soul Ancestors were very frightened, for fear that they would be wiped out.

From the birth of the Primordial Ancestral Realm to the birth of the Primordial Ancestral Spring, it will take some time in between.

Therefore, this period of time is an opportunity for the Soul Ancestor of the Peerless to improve his strength.

As a result, many peerless soul ancestors instantly escaped into the primordial ancestral realm and hid, looking for innate things that could help them quickly improve their strength.

Ye Tian's body also came to the Primordial Ancestral Realm and began to look for all kinds of innate things.

And the copy body began to impact the Ancestor Realm.

At this time, the first one to impact the Ancestor Realm, the benefits are too great, there is no need to wait for the birth of the Primordial Ancestral Spring.

He believed that there were also peerless peak domain ancestors who were also preparing to attack the ancestors.
